phases.title: FTS5 notes_fts + search + dedup-on-post
phases.outcome: notes_fts + 3 triggers + searchNotes + /search note entityType + findSimilarOpenNotes (advisory, before-insert, open+same-project); 1395 tests green; create 201 gains similar[]

phases.title: SSE curation (note title in events.ts) + MCP capture tools
phases.outcome: events.ts note entity_title case + pm_post_note/pm_list_notes/pm_get_note MCP tools + api-client createNote(preserves similar)/listNotes/getNote; MCP 148 tests, server 1396, typecheck 6/6, build 5/5, lint 0 errors. NOTE: executor implemented+verified but stopped before commit; commander ran gates + committed.

open_issues: db:generate has a pre-existing 0005/0006 snapshot parent-pointer collision (unrelated to notes); migrations hand-authored as workaround — informational, not blocking

Dedup recall is AND-gated (sanitizeFtsQuery joins tokens with FTS AND): findSimilarOpenNotes surfaces only open notes containing ALL of the new note's terms. Conservative by design (advisory; triage is the real dedup backstop). Candidate future tweak: OR-weighted similarity — deferred (OR would add noise).
